summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of conversion optimization features on mobile viewport (390x844). All 11 features tested and verified working correctly: Flash sale countdown timer (HH:MM:SS format, ticking), social proof (viewing now/sold today with dynamic updates), sticky bottom CTA with price, product page urgency indicators (Only X left, X viewing), 73% OFF badge, money back guarantee section, checkout progress indicator (Step 2), BEST badge on prepaid option, all 10 testimonials from celestaglow.com, FAQ accordion functionality, and sticky bar visibility on scroll.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All conversion optimization features verified working on mobile viewport (390x844). Countdown timer ticks correctly, social proof numbers update dynamically every 5 seconds, sticky bar always visible, all 10 testimonials present with correct names and locations.

flash_sale_countdown_timer.details: Countdown timer displays in HH:MM:SS format (02:47:32), timer ticks correctly (seconds change), located in red urgency banner with 'FLASH SALE ENDS IN:' text

social_proof_viewing_now.details: Shows '23 viewing now' with Users icon, updates dynamically every 5 seconds (changed to 25 after 6s wait)

social_proof_sold_today.details: Shows '47 sold today' with ShieldCheck icon in green color

sticky_bottom_cta.details: Fixed bottom bar with 'Limited Time Offer', price ₹399 (₹1499 strikethrough), 'Order Now' button - visible at all scroll positions

product_page_urgency_only_x_left.details: Shows 'Only 7 left!' in red text with Clock icon

product_page_urgency_x_viewing.details: Shows '18 viewing' with Users icon in orange color

product_page_73_off_badge.details: Red badge with '73% OFF' positioned at top-left of product image

money_back_guarantee.details: Green section with '💯 100% Money Back Guarantee' and 'Not satisfied? Get full refund within 7 days' text

checkout_progress_indicator.details: Shows Step 2: Shipping Details with 3 progress circles (2 green completed, 1 gray pending)

checkout_best_badge_prepaid.details: Green 'BEST' badge on prepaid option (₹399), prepaid option has green border when selected

all_10_testimonials.details: All 10 testimonials present: Priya (Mumbai), Varun (Bangalore), Kavya Prakash (Ahmedabad), Snehaj (Chennai), Lakshmi (Delhi), Devapriya (Pune), Divya Nair (Kochi), Aisha Khan (Hyderabad), Neha Sharma (Jaipur), Simran Singh (Chandigarh)

faq_accordion.details: 5 FAQ items found, accordion expands/collapses correctly on click, first FAQ about daily use expands with full answer

sticky_bar_on_scroll.details: Sticky bar remains visible at top of page and after scrolling down 1000px

console_warnings: Meta pixel 690863659974240 unavailable due to traffic permission settings (expected - Facebook pixel not configured for preview domain)
